title: Fancy Carpets
description: Fancy Carpets is a resource pack that enhances the appearance of carpets for greater immersion. Compatible with version 21.6 or Above and requires no additional mods.
body:
Fancy Carpets is a resource pack that enhances visual immersion by modifying the appearance of carpets.

Available from version 26.1 onwards, it requires no additional mods, only the base game and the resource pack.
Compatible with other projects of mine, such as:
- **Fancy Snow.** [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-snow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-snow)

What does it add?
- Changes to the models of wool carpets and moss carpets (both normal and pale).
![Colorful Carpets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d06a49e933eba9f1ac2a1ab54aa6b9a86a1085c.png)
![Mossy Carpets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acaad80a479372f085c85e17391d7230fa58c907.png)

Possible errors :
- Potential issues: Z-fighting may occur at long distances due to rendering limitations.
- Breaks in the pale moss carpet model due to its block state behavior.

Performance impact:

- Although the resource pack does not include large files, it uses hidden textures for technical reasons for the models, so its impact is low.
- In the "pale garden" biome, the impact may be slightly greater (though still low) due to block state issues.
